---
title: "Course Video Archive"
subtitle: "Recordings from the 2024 Iteration"
toc: false
number-sections: false
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
    link-external-icon: true
    page-layout: full
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}
These recordings are from the **2024 iteration** of the course. Links for the **2026 iteration** will be uploaded here shortly after the course concludes in March.
:::

## 📺 2024 Lecture Recordings

::: {layout-ncol=2}

### Day 1: Descriptives & EDA
Foundations of data types and exploratory analysis.  
[**Watch Session**](https://youtu.be/f4bBIMs5w08){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

### Day 2: Linear Regression
Introduction to simple and multiple linear regression models.  
[**Watch Session**](https://youtu.be/DXEC9z0FQpM){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

### Day 3: Logistic Regression
Modeling binary outcomes and interpreting odds ratios.  
[**Part 1**](https://youtu.be/ThvKyzUIeZY){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [**Part 2**](https://youtu.be/cWA-BrcN0kM){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

### Day 4: Survival Analysis
Time-to-event data and Cox proportional hazards.  
[**Part 1**](https://youtu.be/8zJkYpFUqRI){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [**Part 2**](https://youtu.be/O8rZbQaIBi8){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

### Day 5: Advanced Topics
Mixed models and course wrap-up.  
[**Watch Session**](https://youtu.be/5ajIkOWAI9Q){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

:::

---
